title: RED Triage — Immediate
content: RED triage: Life-threatening conditions. Airway compromise, breathing failure, circulatory shock, unresponsiveness, major burns >30% TBSA, active seizures, severe chest pain with hemodynamic instability.

title: ORANGE Triage — Very Urgent
description: Conditions requiring very urgent attention within 10 minutes.
content: ORANGE triage: Very urgent. Severe pain (>7/10), high-risk chest pain, acute abdominal pain with rigidity, temperature >41°C, acute confusion, significant mechanism of injury.

title: YELLOW Triage — Urgent
description: Conditions requiring urgent attention within 30-60 minutes.
content: YELLOW triage: Urgent. Moderate pain (4-7/10), moderate fever (38.5-41°C), persistent vomiting/diarrhea, suspected uncomplicated fractures, lacerations requiring sutures.

title: GREEN Triage — Standard
description: Conditions that can wait for standard care.
content: GREEN triage: Standard. Minor injuries, mild pain (<4/10), chronic stable conditions, minor infections, medication refills, minor allergic reactions without systemic symptoms.

title: BLUE Triage — Non-Urgent
content: BLUE triage: Non-urgent. Chronic stable conditions, follow-up visits, dressing changes, suture removals, prescription renewals, non-emergency referrals.
